description: Multi-phase plans currently in flight. Each phase references roadmap item titles; the activePhase section breaks the current phase into concrete tasks with status. Survives conversation compactions — a fresh session can pick up by reading this file.

phases.title: Plugin runtime — manifest, SDK, federation hooks
roadmapItems: Plugin runtime — manifest format, loader, SDK, federation hooks
phases.notes: Shipped. PluginManifest / definePlugin / server + client loaders / auto-mounted federation routes / hello-world reference plugin.

phases.title: Polls & Quizzes plugin — first SDK consumer
roadmapItems: Polls & Quizzes — first plugin (validates simple SDK case)
phases.notes: Shipped end-to-end: schema migrations, REST routes, federation handler, real-time sync via babelr:ws custom event, translation wired manually (to be automated in Phase 3), list-detail view via the new ListDetailView primitive, sidebar-slot button opens the view.

phases.title: SDK gap-closure based on polls implementation
roadmapItems: Translation as default for plugin content — zero-config primitive
phases.notes: All four in-scope tasks shipped: component ergonomics (ComponentType + createElement), translation-by-default (<T>), WS helper (onWsMessage), and documented the server-safe/client-only file-split convention. Plugin authors now have one-liners for the friction points polls exposed. Phase 4 (project management) starts on a smoother SDK. Deferred items persisted to roadmap: 'Plugin SDK — stable re-exports of @babelr/client utilities' (P2, ships with Phase 5), 'Plugin DB abstraction — helper over drizzle for plugin tables' (P3, revisit after PM), 'Plugin test harness — standard pattern for plugin unit + integration tests' (P2, builds alongside PM), and cross-Tower voting is already covered by 'Validate polls federation across two-Tower staging' (P2).

phases.title: Project management plugin — complex SDK consumer
roadmapItems: Project management — second plugin (validates complex SDK case)
phases.notes: Multiple embed kinds, complex schema, plugin-provided view (kanban), AS2 custom objects for federation, drag-and-drop UI. Validates SDK at scale after Phase 3 closes known gaps.

phases.title: Plugin distribution — npm packaging, admin install, manifest freeze
roadmapItems: Plugin distribution — npm packaging, admin install flow, manifest freeze
phases.notes: After polls + PM prove the contract, freeze the manifest and ship public-facing distribution.

activePhase.title: Project management — complex SDK consumer
activePhase.goal: Build PM as the second first-party plugin, validating the SDK at complex scale. Multiple embed kinds, plugin-provided view, drag-and-drop UI, AS2 federation of custom objects, comment threads via useChat. Prove the Phase 3 primitives (<T>, onWsMessage, ComponentType registries, split-file pattern) scale before Phase 5 freezes the manifest.
activePhase.sequencing: Build bottom-up: schema first, then server routes, then kanban UI, then embed/comments, then federation. Each step leaves the plugin runnable — no half-built half-broken state.

tasks.title: Schema + migrations + basic server CRUD
tasks.details: Migrations: plugin_pm_boards (id, slug, server_id, name, description, created_at), plugin_pm_columns (board_id, position, name, wip_limit?), plugin_pm_work_items (board_id, column_id, slug, title, description, priority, item_type, reporter_id, assignee_id?, story_points?, due_date?, position, created_at, updated_at), plugin_pm_work_item_comments (work_item_id, author_id, content, created_at), plugin_pm_sprints (board_id, name, goal, start_date, end_date, status) — sprints optional for v1. Server routes: POST /boards, GET /boards (server-scoped), GET /boards/:slug with columns + items, POST /boards/:slug/work-items, PATCH /work-items/:slug (move/edit), POST /work-items/:slug/comments. All namespaced table prefixes. Drizzle sql template tags through fastify.db.execute (same pattern as polls).

tasks.title: Board list view — ListDetailView + empty kanban on select
tasks.details: Register a 'pm' view with ListDetailView: left rail = boards for the current server (search, create, select), right = selected board's columns as empty lanes. Sidebar slot button '📋 Boards' opens the view. Columns render as fixed named lanes per board row (Todo / In Progress / Done as seed defaults); custom columns come in task-pm-3. At this point plugin runs end-to-end: user creates a board, sees columns, nothing in them yet.

tasks.title: Work item CRUD in the kanban UI
tasks.details: Create work item inline in a column (+ button → compact form). Click card to open detail — reuse the right-sidebar preview pattern via embed registry OR open an inline modal; evaluate which feels better. Detail shows title, description (markdown), priority, item_type, assignee picker, comment thread (task-pm-5). Edit in place. Delete. Translation via <T> on title / description.

tasks.title: Drag-and-drop reordering + cross-column moves
tasks.details: HTML5 drag-and-drop API (no deps). Drop on a column triggers PATCH /work-items/:slug with new column_id + position. Optimistic UI update with rollback on server error. Real-time sync via plugin:pm:updated WS broadcast so other viewers see the move. Handles the N+1 reorder problem with a position-rebalance on the server when positions get tight.

tasks.title: Work item comments thread
tasks.details: Each work item has a chatId (OrderedCollection) on creation — mirrors how events / files / wiki pages handle their comment threads. Use useChat(actor, chatId) in the detail view; get reactions + translations + threading for free. Comment content goes through the existing translation pipeline. Zero new chat code.

tasks.title: [[task:slug]] + [[board:slug]] embeds
tasks.details: Register two embed kinds. [[task:slug]] inline card: title + status badge + assignee avatar + priority indicator. Preview: full detail with comments. [[board:slug]] inline: board name + work-item count + top-3 columns. Preview: mini read-only kanban. Federation handlers resolveBySlug auto-wired via the plugin loader. Validates multiple-embed-kinds-per-plugin for the first time.

tasks.title: Real-time sync across all PM mutations
tasks.details: plugin:pm:updated WS events on work item create/move/edit/delete and on comment create. Client-side cache invalidation + optimistic-update reconciliation. Follow the polls pattern (module-level onWsMessage subscription that publishes into a cache map).

tasks.title: Federation — AS2 custom objects for work items + boards
tasks.details: Work items federate as AS2 Note variants with type: 'WorkItem' + custom fields. Board metadata as Group properties. Inbox handler accepts remote Create/Update/Delete of work items from federated members. Cross-Tower [[server@tower:task:slug]] works through the proxy. Remote members can comment; comment federation reuses the existing Group-followers delivery pattern. This is the biggest chunk — validates AS2 custom object handling for the plugin system, not just message-shaped data.

tasks.title: Polish: translation coverage, edge cases, empty states
tasks.details: Sweep all user-facing strings through <T>. Validate translation works for work item titles + descriptions + comments end-to-end. Empty states for no-boards / no-work-items / no-comments. Error handling for deleted / moved items. Accessibility pass on drag-and-drop. Loading states for slow federation fetches. This is the sign-off pass before declaring PM done.

deferred.title: Sprint planning + sprint view
deferred.reason: Useful but not required for validating the SDK. Ship core kanban first; sprints are additive once work item primitives exist.

deferred.title: Per-board permissions (viewers / editors / admins)
deferred.reason: Core PM inherits server-level CONNECT_VOICE / VIEW_CHANNELS style permissions for v1. Board-scoped roles are a polish item if there's demand.

deferred.title: Import from Jira / Linear / GitHub Issues
deferred.reason: The slack-teams-import roadmap item already covers this pattern for chat; extend when PM is stable. Not blocking the SDK validation goal.
